front: How do nucleic acid therapeutics achieve tissue-specific delivery?
back: Lipid nanoparticles (LNPs) for liver targeting (ApoE adsorption). GalNAc conjugation for hepatocyte-specific delivery via ASGPR. Antibody-oligonucleotide conjugates for non-liver targets. Exosome delivery for CNS. Chemical modifications (2'-OMe, PS) improve stability.
